best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-access-001 title: user access and default message display module: access source pages: 2 preconditions: user has accessed the system. test data: test steps: 1. user accesses the system. 2. system displays a default message. 3. system checks if at least one greenhouse is associated. 4. if no greenhouses are associated, system prompts the user to click "serre". 5. if at least one greenhouse is associated, system displays the list of greenhouses. 6. system loops back to the start. expected result: - default message is displayed. - if no greenhouses are associated, the user is prompted to click "serre". - if at least one greenhouse is associated, the list of greenhouses is displayed.
